title: Stale custom-tags syntax in plugin skill writing references
description: Both skills' writing references document a `:::callout` / `:::collapsible` / `:::tabs` directive syntax that has never existed in the framework — the real transformers use the HTML-tag form (`<callout>`, `<tabs>`, `<collapsible>`) and aren't wired into any parser pipeline anyway. Agents following the skill mass-produce wrong markup (45 files in one consumer migration). Fix the references in the plugin repo + installed cache.
author: claude
